title: Short title
doc_html:
CHAPTER 60. BEHAVIOR ANALYSTS

§3701. Short title

            This Part shall be known and may be cited as the "Behavior Analyst Practice Act".

            Acts 2013, No. 351, §2.

            NOTE: See R.S. 37:3718 regarding termination date of Chapter on July 1, 2028.
doc_text:
CHAPTER 60.  BEHAVIOR ANALYSTS
§3701.  Short title
This Part shall be known and may be cited as the "Behavior Analyst Practice Act".
Acts 2013, No. 351, §2.
NOTE:  See R.S. 37:3718 regarding termination date of Chapter on July 1, 2028.
